seoTitle: CPS News & Updates - Latest Product Releases
seoDescription: Stay updated with the latest CPS news, product announcements, and technical updates.

articles.title: CPS Expands Super-Junction MOSFET Portfolio
articles.summary: CPS announces new super-junction MOSFET series with improved efficiency and reduced Rds(on) for power supply applications.
articles.content: CPS has expanded its super-junction MOSFET portfolio with new devices featuring improved charge compensation technology. The new series offers up to 15% lower Rds(on) compared to previous generations while maintaining excellent switching performance.
